meta.intent: Cap the ice future-value band by making the frozen rescue investment the cleanest two-target order.
meta.expectedPath: Read the lower frozen route as the better rescue investment, open it before broad visible clears, rescue the priority puppy, then pivot through dock-safe clears to the second.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player chases visible side value first, overfills dock or loses water tempo, then reaches the frozen route too late.
meta.whatItProves: The player can integrate ice future value, rescue order, dock cost, water tempo, and crate route tax without vine or new mechanics.
meta.notes: Role: capstone. This intentionally echoes the L28 exam shape but tightens the crate/ice route read for a final band proof.
